name: Cookies & Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the melted butter and crushed OREO cookies well.
2. Press the mixture into a -10-inch springform pan.
3. CAKE
- 2 lb CREAM CHEESE (good quality), softened in Microwave for 2 mins on high
- 1 cup SUGAR
- 5 Jumbo EGGS, warmed in microwave for 25 secs
- 1/2 cup HEAVY CREAM
- 1/4 cup CORNSTARCH
- 1 tbsp VANILLA
- 20 OREOS, each broken into 4 pieces
- 6 oz WHITE CHOCOLATE, melted (optional)
